scope: Pin SwornAgent's binary, vendored protocol bytes, offline installer authority, and supported Codex and Claude managed trees to exact Baton v0.15.1 with fail-closed transactional repair and exact-schema consumer compatibility.

test_results.command: From a clean temporary Git repository with disposable AGENTS_HOME, CODEX_HOME, CLAUDE_HOME, SWORN_HOME and HOME: run bin/sworn doctor --sync-baton twice and assert exits 2 then 0

Validate the replacement report against llm-check-report-v1 and the Sworn overlay, validate the receipt and status against their Draft 2020-12 schemas, and reproduce the claim token hash, report blob, invocation, four authority digests, path union, and baton-maintainability-v1 fingerprint

reachability.evidence: The built public binary ran `bin/sworn baton diff /home/brad/projects/baton` and `bin/sworn baton vendor /home/brad/projects/baton --check`; both exited 0 and reported exact embedded/vendor parity. From a clean temporary Git repository with four disposable, physically disjoint roots, the same binary's `doctor --sync-baton` repaired all three managed homes and Sworn VERSION sentinels with expected exit 2, then immediately re-ran with exit 0 and reported the Codex and Claude mirrors exact. cmd/sworn/doctor_test.go:TestDoctorAndBatonDiffV015BinaryReachability drives the same public entry points across exact, repair, rollback and recovery-only cases without accessing real user homes.

delivered.item: AC-01: every mapped prompt, rule, schema, fixture, manifest identity, upstream VERSION object, adopting VERSION manifest, and the complete 78-entry offline installer archive match exact Baton v0.15.1 authority.
AC-02: vendor check and public Baton diff are mutation-free and report zero repository drift while spec-ambiguity-report-v1 remains independently embedded and classified.
delivered.evidence: Live built-binary `baton diff` and `baton vendor --check` exits 0; cmd/sworn/baton_test.go:TestBatonDiffV015BinaryReachability; internal/baton/manifest_test.go:TestV015SchemaManifestComplete

delivered.item: AC-03: exact tagged Codex and Claude installer scripts under fixed umask 0022 and the native stdlib generator produce complete byte-and-mode-identical managed trees from the one validated embedded archive.

AC-04: doctor rejects unsafe topology before mutation and repairs agents_home, codex_home and claude_home as one crash-durable whole-root transaction with recovery-only restoration and path-only diagnostics.

AC-05: exact v0.15 schema consumers supply canonical report and status identities, while state.Status preserves an explicitly supplied maintainability object opaquely and losslessly without inventing lifecycle state.

The sole planning-authority replacement closure is crash-durable and authoritative: one pushed claim consumed the dispatch, one fresh role-isolated response returned PASS, and a co-committed receipt binds the continuity preimage, exact report blob, invocation, verdict and all four sealed digests.
delivered.evidence: replacement-closure-claim.json at commit 9896756ca118eef46662fba465e95f6ba6adbdb9; replacement-closure-dispatch-receipt.json; reports/maintainability/implementer-cycle-0-1329db03-1597-45a1-a6de-2c778325af62.json at blob 7aadead414b8f04674f2bce5b0966c657922e370; status.json append-only maintainability ledger

not_delivered.item: Complete typed maintainability/null semantics, protocol selection, and active-record migration.
not_delivered.why: S02 carries only the opaque supplied object needed to adopt exact v0.15.1 without weakening the repository gate; the complete record and migration contracts remain separately sliced.

not_delivered.item: Requested-check matching, typed ambiguity separation, and retirement of generic maintainability handling.
not_delivered.why: Those behaviors require the typed report/reference boundary and are explicitly outside this exact Baton-content and installer parity slice.

divergence.description: The planned generic owners internal/baton/diff_test.go and internal/baton/vendor_test.go remained byte-unchanged because their existing mapped-drift, operational-source, schema-mapping, transformed-vendor, idempotence, and check-only tests already covered those generic seams; exact v0.15.1 composition and mutation coverage landed in records_conformance_test.go instead.

The initial install transaction bag failed the sparse maintainability preflight and was replaced, within the ratified one-file boundary, by explicit preflight, captured, staged and published private states before the authoritative closure PASS.
